scrape.snippet: close at the end of july. it breaks my heart to share this with you, just as it did to tell my amazing, loyal team. ❤️ ti bisou was more than a dream — it became a strong brand, a reference point, a family. born from zero restaurant experience but built from scratch with a big heart, an incredible team, a loving and supporting family, faithful friends, and you, our amazing guests… and most of all: a whole lot of love. i’ve learned so much and experienced things i’ll never forget. together with

evaluation.reasoning: Crêperie met family-reference maar gesloten eind juli; onvoldoende concrete kindvriendelijke faciliteiten vermeld.
